allow: Bash(conda run:*)

WebSearch
Bash(sed:*)

Bash(ssh:*)
Bash(kill 35819 2>/dev/null; echo "killed")
Bash(nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps=pid,used_memory --format=csv,noheader 2>/dev/null)
Bash(HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 conda run -n WFCLLM pytest tests/ --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if ''''plugin'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''extension'''' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(cat ~/.claude.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); projects=d.get\('projects',{}\); [print\(k, list\(v.keys\(\)\)\) for k,v in projects.items\(\) if 'plugin' in str\(v\).lower\(\) or 'extension' in str\(v\).lower\(\)]" 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
Bash(find ~/.claude -name "*.json" 2>/dev/null | head -20)
Bash(mkdir -p /root/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official && unzip -o /root/autodl-tmp/WFCLLM/claude-plugins-official-main.zip -d /tmp/claude-plugins-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(cp -r /tmp/claude-plugins-tmp/claude-plugins-official-main/. /root/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official/ && echo "done")
